---
title: "Finse Field Work Gallery"
lightbox: true
---

 

![A Lovely Image](./media/pism.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Another Lovely Image](./media/cnn.png){group="my-gallery"}

![The Last Lovely Image](./media/alt.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Ben in front of Austdalsbeern with a drone.](/media/5-2309_JOSTICE_Austdalsbreen_Thorben-5.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Fifth Lovely Image](./media/PXL_20230830_120843001.MP.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Sixth Lovely Image](./media/Screenshot 2025-04-04 at 14.05.02.png){group="my-gallery"}
